title: Disable 'Update the lag between these tasks' popup for Strict Dependancies
excerpt: It would be nice if we can either permanently or temporarily disable the warning popup.  This adds extra clicks and loading time when updating many tasks

posts.author: ECO_Blair (Blair Cole)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice if we can either permanently or temporarily disable the warning popup. This adds extra clicks and loading time when updating many tasks
